name: Michael Tyler, RussFeingold.com
subject: Sen. Warren: "No Senate race is more important to me"
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Did you see what Elizabeth Warren said about Russ? | Friend, did you see what Elizabeth Warren said about Russ? | "No Senate race is more important to me -- and to the future of our democracy -- than Wisconsin."
_Senator Elizabeth Warren, N ov. 5, 2016_
---
Election Day is on Tuesday, and right-wing groups are spending $10 million to beat Russ. We'll never match them, but that's ok: All we need to do is hit our get-out-the-vote goal by Monday night.
**[Election Day is on Tuesday. There's no time to wait. Donate $5 to help Russ cross the finish line.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf468e/1c469400/1627a55/35454f9/1813281120/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-05_MT_EW_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-05_MT_EW_ND&utm_campaign=MT_EW&utm_medium=ema")**
Keep fighting,
Michael Tyler
Communications Director
[CONTRIBUTE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf468e/1c469400/1627a55/35454f9/1813281120/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-05_MT_EW_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-05_MT_EW_ND&utm_campaign=MT_EW&utm_medium=ema")
---
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Elizabeth Warren
Date: Sat, Nov 5, 2016
Subject: Russ Feingold's lead has been clawed away
[](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf468e/1c469400/1627a55/35454f9/1813281120/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-05_MT_EW_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-05_MT_EW_ND&utm_campaign=MT_EW&utm_medium=ema")
Friend,
The polls in our battleground Senate races have me chewing my fingernails off.
But nowhere am I more concerned than in Wisconsin -- where our champ Russ Feingold's lead has been clawed away to just one point. A statistical tie.
The Republicans and their powerful friends believe that if they just spend an obscene amount of money in Wisconsin these last few days, they can pound Russ into the dirt and buy themselves the Senate majority. That's why they're spending $10 million to help Tea Party radical Ron Johnson between now and Election Day.
**We'll never be able to match Ron Johnson's billionaire buddies dollar-for-dollar (unless you've been hiding $1 0 million under your mattress for a rainy day). But we have something they don't: YOU. And together, this grassroots team is going to prove the GOP and its Super PACs wrong by sending Russ to the Senate Tuesday night.**
**[Russ needs to raise $500,000 by Election Day to fully fund his get-out- the-vote efforts. I know it's a heavy lift, but can you send $5 -- or whatever you can afford -- to help our friend Russ Feingold?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf468e/1c469400/1627a55/35454f9/1813281120/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-05_MT_EW_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-05_MT_EW_ND&utm_campaign=MT_EW&utm_medium=ema")**
[](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf468e/1c469400/1627a55/35454f9/1813281120/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-05_MT_EW_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-05_MT_EW_ND&utm_campaign=MT_EW&utm_medium=ema")
[](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf468e/1c469400/1627a55/35454f9/1813281120/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-05_MT_EW_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-05_MT_EW_ND&utm_campaign=MT_EW&utm_medium=ema")
_Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_
| [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf468e/1c469400/1627a55/35454f6/1813281120/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-05_MT_EW_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-05_MT_EW_ND&utm_campaign=MT_EW&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| | [$25 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf468e/1c469400/1627a55/35454f7/1813281120/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-05_MT_EW_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-05_MT_EW_ND&utm_campaign=MT_EW&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$100 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf468e/1c469400/1627a55/35454f4/1813281120/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-05_MT_EW_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-05_MT_EW_ND&utm_campaign=MT_EW&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| | [Other »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf468e/1c469400/1627a55/35454f5/1813281120/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-05_MT_EW_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-05_MT_EW_ND&utm_campaign=MT_EW&utm_medium=ema&express_lane_other")
---
I don't need to remind you what's at stake in this election, because the difference is clear as daylight. Ron Johnson is the Koch Brothers' "model Senator." He's one of the few Republican leaders who never wavered in his support of Donald Trump.
And when it comes to student debt, raising the minimum wage, protecting Social Security, equal pay for equal work -- you name it, and Ron Johnson consistently sides with the billionaires and giant corporations, not working families.
And what about Russ? He was our fighter long before I got to Washington. He's spent his whole career sanding up to the powerful interests -- fighting for students, for seniors, for women, for workers, for a level playing field -- and that's just what he'll do in the Senate.
That's why Senator Johnson has had the support of not one, not two, but THREE super PACs -- as well as SIXTEEN right-wing groups -- all crushing Russ with nasty, bogus attacks.
I'll be blunt: There is no path to a Democratic majority in the Senate without Wisconsin. And nobody will fight harder for the issues we care about than Russ. Everything is on the line in the next four days of this campaign.
**No Senate race is more important to me -- and to the future of our democracy -- than Wisconsin. That's why I'm asking: Will you help us raise $500, 000 to fully fund Russ's get out the vote efforts?**
**[Contribute $5 right now to help send a rock-solid progressive to fight for us in the Senate.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf468e/1c469400/1627a55/35454f9/1813281120/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-05_MT_EW_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-05_MT_EW_ND&utm_campaign=MT_EW&utm_medium=ema")**
Thanks for being a part of this, and GO RUSS!
Elizabeth
[CONTRIBUTE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf468e/1c469400/1627a55/35454f9/1813281120/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-05_MT_EW_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-05_MT_EW_ND&utm_campaign=MT_EW&utm_medium=ema")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to make a contribution to Russ for Wisconsin, [click here.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf468e/1c469400/1627a55/35454f2/1813281120/VEsHBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-def?utm_source=ema_2016-01-14_fr-footer-contribute&refcode=ema_2016-01-14_fr-footer-contribute&utm_campaign=advocacy-footer-contribute&utm_medium=ema") If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf468e/1c469400/1627a55/35454f3/1813281120/VEsHAQ/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/fr-optput"). If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf468e/1c469400/1627a55/35454f0/1813281120/VEsHAA/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo"). [Click here to unsubscribe](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf468e/1c469400/1627a55/35454f1/1813281120/VEsHAw/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/unsubscribe"). Contributions or gifts to Russ for Wisconsin are not tax deductible. | Authorized and paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
---

It's a close race - but with your help, I know we'll win on Tuesday.

The enthusiasm that I'm seeing from not just Republicans, but independents and many Democrats around the country, is like nothing I've seen in my lifetime since the days of Ronald Reagan.

**And when we win, President-elect Trump and I will get to work IMMEDIATELY for the American people!**

I am so honored to be Donald Trump's running mate, because I know we're going get big things done for our country - real change that will truly Make America Great Again!

* We're going to repeal Obamacare, which is devastating families and businesses, and replace it with market-based reforms.
* We're going to cut taxes, roll back regulation and negotiate better trade deals, to bring millions of good jobs back to our country.
* We're going to drain the swamp in Washington and hold the career politicians and bureaucrats accountable.

And this is just to start!

[**But we won't be able to do any of it unless we win on Tuesday. Your emergency support is CRUCIAL, and every hour counts right now - please join today!**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38588456:WL9UvdurN:m:1:1155937413:D60CCB0C25457453B88AA04DADC6C8C5:r)

body:
my announcement this week in Florida. |

Friend, This week I was honored to make a HUGE announcement in Pensacola, Florida. In the month of October, we raised $100 MILLION in small dollar contributions alone. It was all thanks to patriotic, hardworking men and women chipping in whatever they could to make America great again. $1, $5, $10, $20... all added up to $100 MILLION! And their incredible sacrifices paid off. We’re now winning in Florida, Ohio, Iowa, North Carolina, Maine, and Nevada. But with just TWO DAYS left until the election, we still need to fund our FINAL ad blitz. Please contribute just $1 to join the movement of grassroots supporters sweeping the country. We’re two days away from the CHANGE you’ve been waiting for your entire life. We’re two days away from securing a better FUTURE for our country. We’re two days away from ushering in a new era of AMERICAN GREATNESS. Now step up at the final hour to SAY YOU’RE READY TO WIN AGAIN. Please contribute just $1 to help fund our FINAL ad buy before it’s too late. Thank you, Donald J. Trump CONTRIBUTE $1

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Faith in Culture & Politics Must See Video
body:
On Demand Video: My Faith Matters LIVE Conversation
View this email in your browser.

Dear Peter,

Were you one of the 40 million people who
watched the Chicago Cubs win game 7 of the World Series?

If so, you missed our livestream event, My
Faith Matters LIVE: A Conversation About the Importance of Faith
in American Culture & Politics. It sure feels like we are in the
9th inning of the seventh game of this Presidential Election.
Our faith matters now more than ever. Believe me, you don't want
to miss this event!

Pastor Keith Craft hosted our event from
Elevate Life Church in Frisco, Texas, and he was joined by an
all-star line-up:

Renowned pediatric neurosurgery and My
Faith Votes Honorary Chairman, Dr. Ben Carson
Nationally recognized pastors, David
Jeremiah, J.D. Greear, Samuel Rodriguez, and Vance Pitman
National news correspondent, author, and
speaker, Megan Alexander
Motivational speaker, former NFL player,
and current Texas State Representative, Scott Turner

Eight-time Dove award-winning recording
artist, Todd Smith of Selah, also provided truly inspirational
music!

You can watch the event now on our website.
Or if you were able to join us, we hope you'll forward this
message to your friends and family.

We hope this event helps you, your friends,
and family be informed as you vote this November 8th!

Sincerely,

Jason Yates
Chief Executive Officer
My Faith Votes

body:
We need to RUSH overnight support to Trump ground teams. Join NOW to help us WIN on Tuesday. |

Friend, We’re closing strong, and Mr. Trump is poised to win this historic election on Tuesday. But we can’t let up for a moment – we need every single supporter to JOIN TEAM TRUMP TODAY so we can RUSH overnight support to key battleground states! When you join with an emergency contribution today, your support will be put to work TOMORROW where it’s needed most. It will make an immediate impact. JOIN today with a $3, $5, $10, $20, $35, $50 or $100 contribution, to help put Mr. Trump over the top on Tuesday. body:
| | | Phil Scott's Week In Action!
---
[View this email in your browser](http://us13.campaign-archive2.com/?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=27c3c72e16&e=19cebfe173)
---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=3c777a06cd&e=19cebfe173) | [Share](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=69ca810413&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| | [](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=16cbba914c&e=19cebfe173) | [Tweet](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=42dc13fe37&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| | [](http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=27c3c72e16&e=19cebfe173) | [Forward to a Friend](http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=27c3c72e16&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| Greetings,
---
| **Let’s Do This!**

This is the last weekly update before Election Day on November 8. We cannot thank each and every one of our supporters enough for your efforts and your enthusiasm throughout the last year. But, **we need you now more than ever.** Read below for more on how you can help in these final days of the campaign, and for the latest highlights from the state’s most energetic and hardest working campaign!

**VOTE FOR PHIL ON TUESDAY, NOVEMBER 8...AND HELP US GET OUT THE VOTE!**
First, **make sure you have everything you need to vote on November 8** by clicking [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=d0bd9d6a03&e=19cebfe173). Next, **make a plan to vote**. Know where your polling station is, what hours its open and set a time that you will go. If you can’t make it on November 8, you still have time to take advantage of early voting (more information [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=4b76dfffc3&e=19cebfe173)).

But that’s not enough! There has been [A LOT of misinformation](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=2a2fb32576&e=19cebfe173) in this campaign. Make sure you check out Phil’s [plans](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=b7f4802ba5&e=19cebfe173), [priorities](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=528cab7b2e&e=19cebfe173) and [record](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=56d9fb0f3c&e=19cebfe173) at [www.philscott.org](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=d7053c0e06&e=19cebfe173)**, share our**[**news**](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=3fbc5666cb&e=19cebfe173)**and**[**videos**](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=ce9e18f5cc&e=19cebfe173)**with your friends and encourage them to vote**. This election is important. There is a clear choice, and no one should sit on the sidelines! **Together, we can make sure the economy and affordability are priorities in Montpelier again by _electing Phil Scott as Governor_!**

Voted early for Phil? Share your support with us on Twitter and Facebook: [@PhilScott4VT](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=96f7d69af7&e=19cebfe173) and [https://www.facebook.com/PhilScottforVermont/](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=d4b9216adc&e=19cebfe173)
***
**BENNINGTON BANNER ENDORSES PHIL FOR GOVERNOR**
The _Bennington Banner_ endorsed Phil Scott for Governor, citing his understanding of small businesses across industries work, and noting that this understanding will help improve the economy. You can view the full endorsement [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=971f4cf8d0&e=19cebfe173), and a few highlights below:
* “During his time as lieutenant governor, Scott initiated the ‘Vermont Everyday Jobs’ initiative...and has developed an understanding of how small businesses across a multitude of industries works in Vermont. A governor with a deep understanding of the challenges small businesses face is what's needed in Vermont right now.”
* “If Scott's approach improves the state's economy, this will open the door to solving other issues the state has been struggling with, namely health care, education costs, and the opioid problem.”
* “Scott, a Republican, might be in a better position to bring balance back to Montpelier... He's shown he can work with people from both parties and is widely respected among other seat holders...”

***
**WHAT THIS ELECTION IS ABOUT: YOU AND YOUR ABILITY TO AFFORD TO LIVE IN THE STATE WE ALL LOVE**

>From the time Phil launched his campaign a year ago, throughout the primary campaign and right up until November 8, **Phil has and will make the economy and affordability the top priorities of his campaign and the focus of his efforts as Governor**. **And he is _the only candidate_ in this race that can say that.**

That’s because Phil has also spent every minute of this campaign – and his entire career – connecting with and listening to Vermonters. And what he’s heard from Vermonters is that they need some relief! **Under six years of one-party rule, we’ve seen taxes and fees continuously grow, as our workforce shrinks. We’ve seen overspending and costly, failed experiments carried out at our expense**.

Hearing about the struggles of Vermonters’ who are living paycheck-to-paycheck is what’s kept Phil focused. **He’s put forth comprehensive plans to**[**drive economic growth**](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=abd75bee99&e=19cebfe173)**,**[**rebuild our workforce**](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=10db4d309d&e=19cebfe173)**,**[**make healthcare more affordable**](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=4ae28e9d59&e=19cebfe173)**and**[**modernize state government**](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=e10d81fe6b&e=19cebfe173) so that we have the resources to address our challenges and create even greater opportunity. **You can read Phil’s plans**[**HERE**](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=e096819922&e=19cebfe173)**.**

While Phil’s opponent and her party have been more worried about spreading falsehoods, distracting with gimmicky, divisive stunts, and running from the record of our current Governor while embracing his same policies, **Phil’s been meeting with Vermonters, listening to you and learning from you. Now he’s ready to roll up his sleeves and get to work!**

This week was no exception, as we made stops in **Barton** , **Bennington** , **Bristol** , **Burlington** , **Derby** , **Enosburg** , **Essex** , **Jay Peak** , **Manchester** , **Middlebury** , **New Haven** , **Newport** , **Rutland** , **St. Albans** , **St. Johnsbury** , **Waitsfield** and **Waterbury**. We’ve met with thousands of Vermonters and toured hundreds of businesses. This week, we added the **Bank of Bennington** , **Bristol Bakery** , **Diamonds and More** , **Green Mountain Power Innovation Center** , **Marbleworks** , **McNeil & Reedy**, **Rack & Ree**l, **Roasters** , **Rutland Regional Hospital** , **St. Albans Diner** , **St. Johnsbury GMP** , **The Bakery** , **The Hop n’ Moose** , **Wright’s Sport Shop** and others to the list. Phil also visited students at **Castleton** and the **Maple Tree School**. Thanks to everyone for meeting with us this week and throughout the campaign.

Photo Credit: @PhilScott4VT

***
**JOIN US ON OUR HIGH ROAD TO VICTORY TOUR AND OUR 14 COUNTY SIGN WAVE**
Phil launched his High Road to Victory Tour (#riseaboveit) this week, and we’ve already seen such great enthusiasm and participation at each stop! **The 8-day, 14-county tour features discussions with voters, business and school visits, community events, media interviews, sign waves and much more leading up to the November 8 election.**

The High Road to Victory Tour will hit its peak on **Monday, November 7 with a statewide sprint that will hit all 14 counties and conclude with a high-energy rally at 14 th Star Brewing Company in St. Albans**. Thanks to everyone who has participated so far, and we hope to see more of you over the weekend and through Election Day!

We welcome all Vermonters to join us. View our full list of events [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=d90e0264e1&e=19cebfe173) and the full 14-county sign wave schedule [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=5302936a20&e=19cebfe173). Email [tracy@philscott.org](mailto:tracy@philscott.org) for questions or to get involved!

Photo Credit: @PhilScott4VT

*** **BIPARTISAN SUPPORT FOR PHIL GROWS AS HE ANNOUNCES REGIONAL LEADERSHIP TEAMS**
Phil has continued to build a strong coalition of Vermonters that want to elect a Governor that will make the economy and affordability a priority – **regardless of party**. This week we demonstrated the strength and diversity of that coalition, announcing regional leadership teams of Democratic, Progressive and Independent leaders who are urging voters to join the commonsense, bipartisan support for Phil Scott as Governor.

Hundreds of Democrats, Progressives and Independents from all corners of Vermont are joining **Senator Mazza (D-Grand Isle), Senator Starr (D-Essex/Orleans) and Senator Rodgers (D-Essex/Orleans)** and the **former president of the Vermont State Employees Association**(and Progressive candidate for Attorney General), among many other regional leaders and activists, in supporting Phil Scott for Governor. Read the official press release [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=feafe1f07c&e=19cebfe173).
***
**PROTECTING SCHOOL CHOICE & INDEPENDENT SCHOOLS **
The State Board of Education has issued new rules **that would undermine the rights of towns and parents, and weaken local and regional economies**. The **rule change could strip school choice away from families in over 90 communities** throughout Vermont. This week, Phil called on the Board to withdraw and rewrite the rules **to preserve and strengthen choices for parents**.

In a statement, Phil said “The new rules proposed by the State Board of Education could undermine, or eliminate, school choice in communities where it has existed for over 100 years. **They could also weaken both our educational ecosystem and our economy at a time we need to be strengthening them for our kids and for our economic future**. We should be expanding choices to attract more families and entrepreneurs, not reducing them.”

He is joining other community leaders, including State Representative Oliver Olsen (Independent – Londonderry) in their calls for the Board to reconsider. Read Phil’s full statement [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=ce181f2f6a&e=19cebfe173), and read more about the issue in the [Deerfield Valley News](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=1ba12c9cea&e=19cebfe173) and [the Manchester Journal](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=1efe279c7d&e=19cebfe173).
***
**ICYMI: PHIL IN THE NEWS**

**_Law Enforcement Veteran for Phil Scott_**
“I have spoken with Phil at length over the years about addiction, matters regarding school safety, victims of domestic violence and fair and unbiased policing...If Phil Scott is elected as our next Governor, I feel confident that he will continue to view public safety and law enforcement as a fundamental function of Government. I am confident that [his strategy to combat drug addiction](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=95990f3a39&e=19cebfe173) in this state has merit and long-term vision.” – Sheriff Roger Marcoux (Source: Caledonian Record: [Full Letter](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=dafccbac4a&e=19cebfe173))

**_Phil Scott will bring balance_**
“I have a lot of respect for Phil and have found him to be one of the most thoughtful, humble and authentic people you’re likely to meet in politics – someone who shares Vermont values and conducts himself with a style that should be an example for everyone in politics. I believe Vermonters should put Phil Scott in the governor’s office now more than ever because we need to restore a healthy balance in Montpelier.” – Dawn Terrill, former Secretary of Transportation (Source: Rutland Herald: [Full Letter](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=0c7bf6308a&e=19cebfe173))

**_Scott will make state more affordable_**
“Throughout this campaign, Phil has emphasized making Vermont more affordable and prioritizing economic growth. He’s released policy plans with substantive solutions to advance these platforms. Phil’s budget plan will set responsible limits that ensures that the Legislature spends within its means so working families can get ahead. As he says in his most recent ad, Vermont is a great place, but it can be much better.” – Alan Parent, Georgia (Source: Rutland Herald: [Full Letter](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=8ea9691f66&e=19cebfe173))

**_Environmentalists for Scott_**
I am a committed environmentalist, and I support Phil Scott for governor...Several years ago, Phil Scott and Peter Welch worked with the Douglas administration to clarify and simplify the environmental appeals process. That effort was an example of the kind of leadership Phil provides: bipartisan and collaborative. In my opinion, that is exactly what we need now in Montpelier.” – Wibs McLain, West Berlin (Source: Rutland Herald: [Full Letter](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=d55ad092b8&e=19cebfe173))

**_Scott is choice for Governor_**
“He’s a Vermonter who understands the challenges of living and thriving in Vermont. He’s owned and operated a successful construction company, all while raising his family and serving Vermonters in different capacities. The creation of jobs, lowering taxes and building an economy that will provide a surplus is what we need.” – Joshua Terenzin (Source: Rutland Herald: [Full Letter](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=26b6a27b59&e=19cebfe173))

**_Working for the people of Vermont_**
“I may not have Al Franken coming here, but I have Al French Frys. The people that are here, the working class, the blue collar workers, that’s where I receive all of my support. I may not have the support of the political elitists, but I have the working class." (Source: WPTZ: [Full Video](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=d6f4ef95a9&e=19cebfe173))

**_The hardest-working candidate plans to finish strong_**
"In my racing career, I've always tried to run the last lap as hard as the first lap and I'll do the same here.” (Source: WCAX: [Full Video](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=a26509b8c8&e=19cebfe173))

**_The truth about Phil_**
“Phil is pro-choice. He is the father of two daughters and will always fight for them, and all women, to have control over their own bodies. A rational person or organization, especially one which looks to protect women’s full reproductive rights, should welcome support from people of all stripes. The only way to truly make progress - and defend these critical rights against any attempt to weaken them - is to have all sides on board.” – Chittenden County Sen. Helen Riehle (Source: Caledonian Record: [Full Letter](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=4fe3b87747&e=19cebfe173))

**_New Ad: Phil’s vision for a brighter future_**
“Let’s prioritize what’s really important to Vermont – the affordability of Vermont. The economy is important to each and every one of us. We need to create an environment that’s conducive to growth, so that people can succeed and businesses can prosper.” (Source: VT Digger: [Full Article](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=d8afaa9355&e=19cebfe173)/[Full Ad](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=a1f69ea35d&e=19cebfe173))

**_New Ad: Together, we can make Vermont even better_**
“Vermont’s a great place and together we can make it even better. Let’s focus on growing the economy and creating jobs. Let’s make government more efficient and healthcare and housing more affordable. Let’s prioritize investments in pro-growth areas like early education and infrastructure.” (Source: VT Digger: [Full Article](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=b8982070d3&e=19cebfe173)/[Full Ad](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=b0bc974de1&e=19cebfe173))
***
**ICYMI: THIS WEEK’S #GOODREADS**

Integrity matters, and Vermonters are telling us it has become a driving force in this campaign. Here are a few #GoodReads that highlight the importance of integrity, and the value of Phil’s character:

**_Phil Scott for Governor_**
“I believe there are two essential questions we must ask ourselves when we decide for whom we are going to vote. The first question is, ‘Where does the candidate stand on the issues that are most important?’ The second question is, ‘What kind of character does the candidate have?’ Both of these questions are important, but perhaps the second question is the most important. Tomorrow’s issues are largely unknown, and because of that, more than anything, we depend on the character, judgment and integrity of the people we decide to trust.” – Candi Moot, Morgan (Source: Rutland Herald: [Full Article](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=12e1cf7230&e=19cebfe173))

**Planned Parenthood’s risky gamble with Scott/Minter race**
“All’s fair in the campaign’s last moments. People only remember who won, not how they won. Ms. Minter has obviously decided she’s comfortable with her roll of the ethical dice.” (Source: St. Albans Messenger: [Full Editorial](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=4e6ce7fdab&e=19cebfe173))

**_Mud-Slinging, Vermont Style_**
“As time goes on this pattern is becoming more entrenched and predictable, but the ads purporting to link Phil Scott to the Koch brothers establish a new low.” – Steven Gorelick, Walden (Source: VT Digger: [Full Article](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=3db35728d8&e=19cebfe173))

**_Planned Parenthood ad hits new low_**
“For the record, we ‘typical’ Republicans in the Vermont state Senate have voted to support the principles of Roe v. Wade in a resolution that has been offered at the commencement of each biennium. Phil Scott also voted for that resolution when he was a state senator. Sue Minter knows that. Sue, I know you cannot control the Planned Parenthood PAC, but allowing this ad to continue running without challenging it places an obstacle in front of any claim to be able to work across the aisle. I respectfully ask that you publicly disavow that ad.” – Sen. Joe Benning, Senate Minority Leader, Caledonia-Orange District (Source: Burlington Free Press: [Full Letter](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=8b772b9125&e=19cebfe173))

**_A closer look at the record_**
Phil has run a campaign focused on the issues that matter to Vermonters. But we’ve seen many attempts from his opponents to distract with “[watch the birdie politics](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=c51e8c1d18&e=19cebfe173).” That’s because the record of six years of one-party rule, and his opponent’s own record demonstrate exactly why Vermonters from all sides of the aisle are looking for change. A commentary in VT Digger this week from Thomas Joseph takes an important look at the record of Phil’s opponent. Read it [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=f4e3290cf2&e=19cebfe173). In contrast, take a look at a few highlights from Phil’s record [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=63fafd818d&e=19cebfe173).
*******
Thanks to everyone for continuing to follow and support our campaign. Be sure to follow along with the campaign’s activities every day – and share your thoughts – [@PhilScott4VT](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=c2fb860a01&e=19cebfe173) and [https://www.facebook.com/PhilScottforVermont/](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=4a7f6606b3&e=19cebfe173).

Sincerely,
Team Scott

clean_body: | | | Phil Scott's Week In Action! | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | Greetings, | Let’s Do This! This is the last weekly update before Election Day on November 8. We cannot thank each and every one of our supporters enough for your efforts and your enthusiasm throughout the last year. But, we need you now more than ever. Read below for more on how you can help in these final days of the campaign, and for the latest highlights from the state’s most energetic and hardest working campaign! VOTE FOR PHIL ON TUESDAY, NOVEMBER 8...AND HELP US GET OUT THE VOTE! First, make sure you have everything you need to vote on November 8 by clicking . Next, make a plan to vote. Know where your polling station is, what hours its open and set a time that you will go. If you can’t make it on November 8, you still have time to take advantage of early voting (more information ). But that’s not enough! There has been in this campaign. Make sure you check out Phil’s , and at , share our your friends and encourage them to vote. This election is important. There is a clear choice, and no one should sit on the sidelines! Together, we can make sure the economy and affordability are priorities in Montpelier again by electing Phil Scott as Governor! Voted early for Phil? Share your support with us on Twitter and Facebook: and * BENNINGTON BANNER ENDORSES PHIL FOR GOVERNOR The Bennington Banner endorsed Phil Scott for Governor, citing his understanding of small businesses across industries work, and noting that this understanding will help improve the economy. You can view the full endorsement , and a few highlights below: “During his time as lieutenant governor, Scott initiated the ‘Vermont Everyday Jobs’ initiative...and has developed an understanding of how small businesses across a multitude of industries works in Vermont. A governor with a deep understanding of the challenges small businesses face is what's needed in Vermont right now.” “If Scott's approach improves the state's economy, this will open the door to solving other issues the state has been struggling with, namely health care, education costs, and the opioid problem.” “Scott, a Republican, might be in a better position to bring balance back to Montpelier... He's shown he can work with people from both parties and is widely respected among other seat holders...” * WHAT THIS ELECTION IS ABOUT: YOU AND YOUR ABILITY TO AFFORD TO LIVE IN THE STATE WE ALL LOVE From the time Phil launched his campaign a year ago, throughout the primary campaign and right up until November 8, Phil has and will make the economy and affordability the top priorities of his campaign and the focus of his efforts as Governor. And he is the only candidate in this race that can say that. That’s because Phil has also spent every minute of this campaign – and his entire career – connecting with and listening to Vermonters. And what he’s heard from Vermonters is that they need some relief! Under six years of one-party rule, we’ve seen taxes and fees continuously grow, as our workforce shrinks. We’ve seen overspending and costly, failed experiments carried out at our expense. Hearing about the struggles of Vermonters’ who are living paycheck-to-paycheck is what’s kept Phil focused. He’s put forth comprehensive plans to so that we have the resources to address our challenges and create even greater opportunity. You can read Phil’s plans. While Phil’s opponent and her party have been more worried about spreading falsehoods, distracting with gimmicky, divisive stunts, and running from the record of our current Governor while embracing his same policies, Phil’s been meeting with Vermonters, listening to you and learning from you. Now he’s ready to roll up his sleeves and get to work! This week was no exception, as we made stops in Barton , Bennington , Bristol , Burlington , Derby , Enosburg , Essex , Jay Peak , Manchester , Middlebury , New Haven , Newport , Rutland , St. Albans , St. Johnsbury , Waitsfield and Waterbury. We’ve met with thousands of Vermonters and toured hundreds of businesses. This week, we added the Bank of Bennington , Bristol Bakery , Diamonds and More , Green Mountain Power Innovation Center , Marbleworks , McNeil & Reedy, Rack & Reel, Roasters , Rutland Regional Hospital , St. Albans Diner , St. Johnsbury GMP , The Bakery , The Hop n’ Moose , Wright’s Sport Shop and others to the list. Phil also visited students at Castleton and the Maple Tree School. Thanks to everyone for meeting with us this week and throughout the campaign. Photo Credit: @PhilScott4VT JOIN US ON OUR HIGH ROAD TO VICTORY TOUR AND OUR 14 COUNTY SIGN WAVE Phil launched his High Road to Victory Tour (#riseaboveit) this week, and we’ve already seen such great enthusiasm and participation at each stop! The 8-day, 14-county tour features discussions with voters, business and school visits, community events, media interviews, sign waves and much more leading up to the November 8 election. The High Road to Victory Tour will hit its peak on Monday, November 7 with a statewide sprint that will hit all 14 counties and conclude with a high-energy rally at 14 th Star Brewing Company in St. Albans. Thanks to everyone who has participated so far, and we hope to see more of you over the weekend and through Election Day! We welcome all Vermonters to join us. View our full list of events and the full 14-county sign wave schedule . Email mailto:tracy@philscott.org for questions or to get involved! Photo Credit: @PhilScott4VT BIPARTISAN SUPPORT FOR PHIL GROWS AS HE ANNOUNCES REGIONAL LEADERSHIP TEAMS Phil has continued to build a strong coalition of Vermonters that want to elect a Governor that will make the economy and affordability a priority – regardless of party. This week we demonstrated the strength and diversity of that coalition, announcing regional leadership teams of Democratic, Progressive and Independent leaders who are urging voters to join the commonsense, bipartisan support for Phil Scott as Governor. Hundreds of Democrats, Progressives and Independents from all corners of Vermont are joining Senator Mazza (D-Grand Isle), Senator Starr (D-Essex/Orleans) and Senator Rodgers (D-Essex/Orleans) and the former president of the Vermont State Employees Association(and Progressive candidate for Attorney General), among many other regional leaders and activists, in supporting Phil Scott for Governor. Read the official press release . PROTECTING SCHOOL CHOICE & INDEPENDENT SCHOOLS The State Board of Education has issued new rules that would undermine the rights of towns and parents, and weaken local and regional economies. The rule change could strip school choice away from families in over 90 communities throughout Vermont. This week, Phil called on the Board to withdraw and rewrite the rules to preserve and strengthen choices for parents. In a statement, Phil said “The new rules proposed by the State Board of Education could undermine, or eliminate, school choice in communities where it has existed for over 100 years. They could also weaken both our educational ecosystem and our economy at a time we need to be strengthening them for our kids and for our economic future. We should be expanding choices to attract more families and entrepreneurs, not reducing them.” He is joining other community leaders, including State Representative Oliver Olsen (Independent – Londonderry) in their calls for the Board to reconsider. Read Phil’s full statement , and read more about the issue in the and . ICYMI: PHIL IN THE NEWS Law Enforcement Veteran for Phil Scott “I have spoken with Phil at length over the years about addiction, matters regarding school safety, victims of domestic violence and fair and unbiased policing...If Phil Scott is elected as our next Governor, I feel confident that he will continue to view public safety and law enforcement as a fundamental function of Government. I am confident that in this state has merit and long-term vision.” – Sheriff Roger Marcoux (Source: Caledonian Record: ) Phil Scott will bring balance “I have a lot of respect for Phil and have found him to be one of the most thoughtful, humble and authentic people you’re likely to meet in politics – someone who shares Vermont values and conducts himself with a style that should be an example for everyone in politics. I believe Vermonters should put Phil Scott in the governor’s office now more than ever because we need to restore a healthy balance in Montpelier.” – Dawn Terrill, former Secretary of Transportation (Source: Rutland Herald: ) Scott will make state more affordable “Throughout this campaign, Phil has emphasized making Vermont more affordable and prioritizing economic growth. He’s released policy plans with substantive solutions to advance these platforms. Phil’s budget plan will set responsible limits that ensures that the Legislature spends within its means so working families can get ahead. As he says in his most recent ad, Vermont is a great place, but it can be much better.” – Alan Parent, Georgia (Source: Rutland Herald: ) Environmentalists for Scott I am a committed environmentalist, and I support Phil Scott for governor...Several years ago, Phil Scott and Peter Welch worked with the Douglas administration to clarify and simplify the environmental appeals process. name: Hillary for Virginia
subject: Tomorrow: Don't miss Tim Kaine in Northern Virginia
body:
| Derek --

You still have time to join Tim Kaine in Northern Virginia. Don't miss this amazing opportunity to hear from him in person!

**Check out the details and RSVP now:**
| [](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjY5ODk0ODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDIzNjcwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---

Thanks!

Hillary for Virginia

\-----Forwarded message-----
From: Tim Kaine
Subject: Monday: Join me in Northern Virginia before Election Day!

Derek --

Joining Hillary on this ticket has been one of the most amazing experiences of my life. Meeting everyday Americans and hearing your stories is both inspiring and humbling, and I couldn’t be more grateful for the warm welcome I’ve received from you on the campaign trail.

[**On Monday, the day before Election Day, Anne and I will be hosting a rally in Northern Virginia and I would love to see you there. Can you make it? **](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjY5ODk0ODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDIzNjcwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

I want to share our vision for America with you -- and talk about making our economy work for everyone, improving access to healthcare, and making it possible for all kids to graduate from college debt-free. Hillary has the strength, tenacity, and experience to meet these challenges head on, but she’s going to need help from her best supporters like you to get there.

**Tuesday is Election Day, so there’s no time to waste. I can’t wait to make the case to you and other Virginians for Hillary. Space is limited, so RSVP now to reserve your spot:**

[](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjY5ODk0ODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDIzNjcwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
See you there,

Tim

**We need your help to Get Out the Vote. Will you sign up for a shift (or three) in the final days of the election?
| [

---

***If you've attended events in the past or have an account on HillaryClinton.com, click the button to be automatically confirmed.**
| Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just click [here](https://www.hillaryclinton.com/forms/contact-us/) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjY5ODk0ODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDIzNjcwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjY5ODk0ODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDIzNjcwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjY5ODk0ODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDIzNjcwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjY5ODk0ODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDIzNjcwS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjY5ODk0ODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDIzNjcwS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjY5ODk0ODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDIzNjcwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjY5ODk0ODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDIzNjcwS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjY5ODk0ODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDIzNjcwS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president. Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185 [Privacy Policy](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjY5ODk0ODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDIzNjcwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Tyler Foote
subject: Vote YES on Right to Work Amendment
body:
Protect your Right to Work in Virginia!
---
| | |
---
| | |
---|---|---
| | Hi Peter,

See below for a note from our friends at the Workplace Freedom Committee.

Virginia is one of 26 states which protects worker freedom through a Right to Work law. Right to Work says employees cannot be required to join a union as a condition or qualification for getting or keeping a job.

Right to Work protects an individual's freedom to choose whether a union is right for them.

We need to make sure Right to Work is not taken away by a future legislature or rogue judges. While Right to Work laws are very popular and lead to higher job creation, they are under attack from special interests across the country who would relish the opportunity to make Virginia a forced-union state.

You can protect the right to work in Virginia by voting YES on the Right to Work amendment on your ballot.

Thank you for standing up for worker freedom!

Sincerely,

Tyler Foote
Virginia State Director
Americans for Prosperity

Authorized by the Workplace Freedom Committee

---
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
We respect your right to privacy - [view our policy](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=e44046de78c78dc47fba20c28c6b6267759d56508c96c19979c3c5f94ccf3b5419b597d03eaa9b4e)
Americans For Prosperity 1310 N. Courthouse Road, Suite 700 Arlington, VA 22201

name: Meredith Shevitz
subject: Get Out The Vote!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd9d/2a380d31/1490d778/ff1432/2852317713/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd9d/2a380d31/1490d778/ff1432/2852317713/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
**Team, it's time to get to work.**
If we want to win this election for Governor Hassan, for Democrats up and down the ticket, and for our families, we all have to do our part. We need to make calls, knock doors, and turn out as many voters as possible. **[Sign up for a volunteer shift to help elect Maggie and turn Congress and the White House blue.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd9d/2a380d31/1490d778/ff1433/2852317713/VEsF/ "https://www.hillaryclinton.com/start/?act=gotv")**
Kelly Ayotte may have corporate special interests on her side, but we have our own secret weapon -- YOU. If all of you show up to volunteer through Election Day, we can win this race and take back the Senate. According to Nate Silver, New Hampshire voters (like you and your neighbors) have 17x more power in deciding Senate control than the average American voter -- **If we're going to win this thing, we all need to step up and get out the vote.**
**This is one of my absolute favorite times of the election -- volunteering is fun, easy, and doesn't take much time. And every single voter you talk to is more likely to get out and help swing this election for Maggie and Democrats up and down the ticket. [Please, sign up for a volunteer shift.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd9d/2a380d31/1490d778/ff1433/2852317713/VEsC/ "https://www.hillaryclinton.com/start/?act=gotv")**
Thanks for stepping up.
Meredith Shevitz
Deputy Political Director, Maggie for NH
P.S. -- Take a second to check **[iwillvote.com](iwillvote.com)** to make sure you know where you're going on Election Day, and tell all your friends and neighbors to do the same. Remember, you can register in-person at your polling place on Election Day -- no excuses, we need you!

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd9d/2a380d31/1490d778/ff143c/2852317713/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMTA2X0dPVFYtVm9sIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161106_GOTV-Vol&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

body:
With the election 2 days away an incredible opportunity for... |

Friend, This is your last opportunity to have your support of Donald J. Trump and our candidates for the Senate and the House triple matched before Election Day. I sincerely hope you will take advantage today. I just heard from Chairman Priebus and a small group of generous supporters who are fed up with the deceitful, vicious attack ads they’re seeing from Hillary Clinton and her liberal allies. Furthermore, they are disgusted with the mainstream media seemingly taking their orders from the Clinton camp. This group has decided to step forward right now and triple match any donation made before midnight tonight. Friend, that means your gift today of $55 will be immediately triple matched for a real impact of $220. The money we are able to raise during this final triple match will be put into our advertising and critical Get-Out-the-Vote operation, which will be pivotal in electing Republicans up and down the ballot. I chose to write you Friend, because I know you are committed to winning the White House and keeping our majorities in Congress. You also know what we’re up against and what it will take to win in less than one week. So please take action right now with your generous contribution of $25, $55, $100, or even $250. Remember the triple match is ONLY in effect until midnight so please act today. Thank you, Newt Gingrich P.S. Friend, as long as you give before midnight, every dollar you donate will be triple matched by a group of supporters. Please help us fund our final GOTV operations before it’s too late. CONTRIBUTE $55

body:
Our final weekend push. | Dear Friend, Here are a few numbers that should be at the top of your mind: **2**
Days until Election Day **4,271,911**

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Eric=20Trump?=
subject: You need to see this ad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
We only have a few hours to get it up in NINE states. |

Friend, Our last ad we showed you did so well that we decided to release a new one -- and go even bigger with a last-minute $4 MILLION final ad-buy. It’s an UNPRECEDENTED two-minute ad that presents voters with the true stakes of this historic election. But we only have until 9PM EST TONIGHT to get it up in NINE battleground states where polls are drastically tightening. When you’re finished watching our ad, please consider making a contribution to help us get this ad on the air. Contribute $144 to help with 180 seconds of airtime Contribute $96 to help with 120 seconds of airtime Contribute $48 to help with 60 seconds of airtime Contribute $24 to help with 30 seconds of airtime Contribute $8 to help with 10 seconds of airtime CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT In 2 days, Americans have the opportunity to stand up to the corrupt establishment responsible for our disastrous trade deals, lost jobs, massive illegal immigration, and economic and foreign policies that have bled our country dry. The only thing that can stop this corrupt machine is you. The only force strong enough to save our country is us. The only people brave enough to vote out this corrupt establishment is you, the American people. Things might look grim for our country today. But our campaign is built on the idea that we can usher in a future brighter than our past, and revive the American Dream for all Americans. Hillary is the candidate of yesterday. We are the movement of the future. I know you’re already on board. But we need to show the rest of the country what’s at stake, and the real change we’re prepared to deliver. Please make a contribution of $48 to help us get this ad on the air in NINE battleground states during the FINAL 60 hours of the election. Thanks, Eric Trump Contribute $48 to help with 60 seconds of airtime

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I'm asking personally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
We've heard enough false statements over this campaign to last a lifetime. But there's one that really gets me -- and it wasn't even from you-know-who... [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20161106-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---
Friend,

We've heard enough false statements over this campaign to last a lifetime. But there's one that really gets me -- and it wasn't even from you-know-who:
_" Democrats have this election sewn up!"_ Let's be clear about how wrong this is: Not only are six crucial Senate races statistically tied, but the GOP is plowing millions into attack ads on a near-daily basis.

Without a Democratic Senate, we're going to be in tough battle to get a Supreme Court justice confirmed. We won't get a vote on raising the minimum wage or refinancing student loans or equal pay for equal work. A Senate majority is crucial. **If we ignore that reality, we play right into their hands -- and I refuse to do it.**

That's why I'm criss-crossing the country for Democrats like Russ Feingold, Maggie Hassan, and Jason Kander -- great candidates who need one last boost of support to overcome the kitchen sink that Republicans are throwing at them.

[**Can you join me and pitch in to give our Democratic Senate candidates one last boost before Election Day? With these races as tight as they are, your support could help make the difference between victory and defeat.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20161106-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Republicans call in their billionaire backers to win elections. They think that with enough money and enough disgusting attack ads, they can buy themselves a Republican majority. Democrats do it differently -- with an army of grassroots organizers going door-to-door during this crucial final stretch.

But it takes resources to knock on doors and make phone calls -- yes, money. And as our campaigns get ready for one last surge to get out the vote, it's our job to have their backs right now. **That 's what Democrats are all about.**

**Now is when your support matters most, Friend. Please join us with a contribution before it 's too late:**

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20161106-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=1")

[Pitch in $5 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20161106-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=5")

[Pitch in $15 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20161106-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=15")

[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20161106-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=25")

[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20161106-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=35")

[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20161106-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth Warren

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ef7b/2b07114c/4d01a8a4/735b6c7b/2376404391/VEsHAQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ef7b/2b07114c/4d01a8a4/735b6c7a/2376404391/VEsHAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate in November, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ef7b/2b07114c/4d01a8a4/735b6c75/2376404391/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

body:

# [www.DonaldJTrump.com ](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mi_grnd_rpds_t&n=2)
---
|
---
JOIN US IN GRAND RAPIDS, MI TOMORROW!
| Dear Peter,

Remember to get your tickets to join Donald Trump, Governor Mike Pence, and team in Grand Rapids, MI **tomorrow, Nov. 7th********at 11:00 PM** for a rally! [Get your tickets here](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2Fschedule%2Fregister%2Fgrand-rapids-mi3%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mi_grnd_rpds_t&n=3 "https://www.donaldjtrump.com/schedule/register/grand-rapids-mi3/"). Details about the event are below:

****Monday, Nov. 7th: Grand Rapids, MI
**** Devos Place
303 Monroe Ave NW
Grand Rapids, MI 49503

Doors Open: 8:00 PM
Event Begins: 11:00 PM
[Get your tickets here](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2Fschedule%2Fregister%2Fgrand-rapids-mi3%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mi_grnd_rpds_t&n=4 "https://www.donaldjtrump.com/schedule/register/grand-rapids-mi3/").
_

_ Please limit personal items and arrive early to expedite entrance into the venue - please note, **NO homemade signs, banners, professional cameras with a detachable lens, tripods, monopods, selfie sticks, back packs or large bags will be permitted into the venue.**

We hope to see you there! Sincerely,

name: Marlon Marshall, HillaryClinton.com
subject: Have you told your friends where to vote yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
Two days. | We're less than 60 hours away from polls closing, Derek.

Our staff and volunteers in the field are out knocking on every possible door, and calling every voter they can. They're getting folks the information they need to vote -- and you can help right now, with just a few clicks.

**Help your friends get ready to vote on Tuesday by sharing the polling place lookup tool on Facebook:**
[](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjY5ODk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDIzOTA1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
As a member of Team Hillary, you've got skin in this game -- it’s your job to make sure your friends don't sit on the sidelines.

Let's do this.

Marlon

Marlon Marshall
Director of States and Political Engagement
Hillary for America

P.S. If you still need to **[confirm your polling place location](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjY5ODk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDIzOTA1S0&mt=1&rt=0)** , you can do that, too!

|
**Will you Get Out the Vote for Hillary?**
Sign up for a volunteer shift (or two or three) in the final days before Election Day:
| [
](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjY5ODk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDIzOTA1S0&mt=2&rj=OTIxMDIzOTA1S0&rt=0)
---

**** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2.6 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjY5ODk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDIzOTA1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjY5ODk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDIzOTA1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Opening this email on your iPhone? [Click here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjY5ODk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDIzOTA1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to get our Hillary 2016 mobile app now. Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjY5ODk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDIzOTA1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjY5ODk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDIzOTA1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjY5ODk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDIzOTA1S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjY5ODk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDIzOTA1S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjY5ODk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDIzOTA1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjY5ODk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDIzOTA1S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjY5ODk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDIzOTA1S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjY5ODk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDIzOTA1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e0f/738133e4/33bd8cdb/7f85b907/3554940708/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161106?refcode=pme161106_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

| I was checking over our budget, and I have to tell you --

**It doesn 't look good at all.**

Our GOTV program needs cash. Lots of cash. We need to take in $100,000 by midnight if we want to do all the field operations we need to defeat Marco Rubio and turn the Senate blue.

[_**We 're opening up our FINAL MATCH PROGRAM of the campaign. Rush in a contribution today and we'll double whatever you give.**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e0f/738133e4/33bd8cdb/7f85b907/3554940708/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161106?refcode=pme161106_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

**Right now, we 're only at $50,000.**

Desperate times call for desperate measures. And with only 48 hours left until Election Day -- this is desperate.

[_**What do you say? Will you help?**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e0f/738133e4/33bd8cdb/7f85b907/3554940708/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161106?refcode=pme161106_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

I'll keep an eye on the numbers and give you a status update later.

Thanks,

Mandi

subject: Let's Grab 'Em By the Ballot. #VOTEPROCHOICE
body:
Let's Grab 'Em By the Ballot. #VOTEPROCHOICE | | | [](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/v3Zos/6/Y/r5cs/6Lv2oz/z1s0jahTQv) |
---|---
| | Dear Activist,

The vast majority of humans are disgusted and horrified by Donald Trump. Let's turn horror into action and vote in record numbers to defeat Trump and elect Hillary Clinton as our first woman President!
Let's not stop there. We can defeat all the "little Trumps" if we [#VOTEPROCHOICE](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/v3Zos/s/sr/r5cs/6Lv2oz/bNwaYPUn7 "Link: http://bit.ly/vpcvgfront")
up and down the ballot.
We've made this easy with **the**[**#VOTEPROCHOICE Voter Guide**](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/v3Zos/v/sr/r5cs/6Lv2oz/sVNUL9uyPu "Link: http://bit.ly/vpcvgfront"). Everyone headed to the polls can see where their candidates stand on reproductive rights. |
---|---
| | The[ ](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/v3Zos/z/sr/r5cs/6Lv2oz/vXme5lZGsv)**[#VOTEPROCHOICE Voter Guide](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/v3Zos/U/sr/r5cs/6Lv2oz/vcvT4nO8MC "Link: http://bit.ly/vpcvgfront")** features all national, state and **most local elections** in geographically accurate sample ballots.

We have over 10,000 prochoice endorsements from our partners and prochoice friends. _[Help us get this to all your prochoice friends.](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/v3Zos/j/se/r5cs/6Lv2oz/D2uavxp4Y "Link: https://www.facebook.com/VoteProChoice/photos/a.1034924459925369.1073741829.1005566252861190/1168906859860461/?type=3&theater")_ | | | |

Heidi Sieck and Bob Fertik

subject: Last Two Days for GOTV!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg for Montana, PO
body:
Greg for Montana

VOLUNTEER ELECTION DAY

It's time to Get Out The Vote -
GOTV!

We're Calling and Knocking in the
FINAL FIVE DAYS

Let's do ALL we can to get our
voters to the polls for Greg, Lesley, and the GOP!
Sign up for a shift below, or
come for whatever time you can give

MONDAY - NOVEMBER 7th SHIFTS:
9am - 12pm
12pm-3pm
3pm-6pm
6pm-8pm

TUESDAY - NOVEMBER 8th - ELECTION
DAY SHIFTS:
9am - 12pm
12pm-3pm
3pm-6pm
6pm-8pm

Campaign & MTGOP Headquarters -
ALL Offices

524 Professional Drive - Bozeman
1211 Grand Avenue, Ste 5 -
Billings
1320 River Drive N, Ste 1320 -
Great Falls
1300 Aspen, Ste B - Helena
410 W Arizona - Kalispell
1330 W Broadway, Ste B - Missoula
Bring a pair of headphones to use
with your phone if you like!
You may also call from home - ask
for details.

Please RSVP with your chosen
shift to Amy@gregformontana.com, 333-1553 or to the corresponding
field director at this LINK

And don't forget to VOTE!
Thank you

Team Greg for Montana

Paid for by Greg for Montana, PO
Box 1557, Helena, MT, 59624, Republican

body:
Peter --

Get your tickets to join Donald Trump and team in Leesburg, VA **TONIGHT at 9:30 PM** for a rally! 17558 Dry Mill Rd.
Leesburg, VA 20175

Event Begins: 9:30 PM

name: Kelley
subject: making history
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
body:
Hey Team,

In these final days, I’m working my tail off to reach as many voters as I can, but I can’t do it alone.

It’s going to take field teams in all 67 counties to turn out the vote. Can you help fund our final GOTV push? Today only your donation will be *TRIPLE* matched. Don’t miss this chance to make an outsized impact on this race, pitch in now:

24 HOURS ONLY: Triple your donation → https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/elect-katie-mcginty?refcode=e20161106.5&refcode2=e20161106.5nd&amount=25

We’ve got so much going for us team. We’re fighting for working families and progressive values, but Toomey’s allies spending big to drown us out. In order to close this thing out, we’re gonna have to dig deep.

This race is as close as it gets, and there won’t be any second chances come November 9th. Can you give us a boost for the final 48 hours?

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/elect-katie-mcginty?refcode=e20161106.5&refcode2=e20161106.5nd&amount=25

Thank you,

Katie

* A note on donations *

There are only 2 days left in this race, and the polls are in a virtual tie. Katie is fighting for working families in PA — but we’re up against major special interest spending. Can you make a grassroots donation today to help Katie win this race and take back the Senate?
Chip in $5 today. Thank you.

Donate Now

----------------------------------------------
| Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
----------------------------------------------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please https://act.myngp.com/el/3778693960524890112/5153833211851177984.

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: OurRevolution.com
subject: 2 ways you can help win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Our plan to win elections is simple: we can help shift whole elections by turning out Bernie supporters to vote for candidates from our political revolution.
The more Bernie supporters we can turn out on Tuesday, the more races we'll win. The more races we win, the more progressive power we'll have.
We've already contacted tens of thousands of Bernie voters and asked them to support our candidates. When we did it during the primaries for endorsed candidates, we had a HUGE impact. One Our Revolution-endorsed candidate in Rhode Island unseated the majority leader of the state house by just 17 votes after our volunteers turned out Bernie supporters in her district.
**Our plan to win is simple. But if it's going to work, we need people on the phones, knocking on doors, and talking to voters. That means we need you for GOTV now, sisters and brothers.**
There are two ways you can help get out the vote. You can start making phone calls from home and ask Bernie voters to support our candidates:
****[START CALLING VOTERS»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/phonebank/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/phonebank/")****
If you can't volunteer, you can still help us win. Make a contribution to support our GOTV work.
**[DONATE $3 FOR GOTV»](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotv-for-our-revolution?refcode=em161106 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotv-for-our-revolution?refcode=em161106")**
We can continue our political revolution, one door, one call, and $27 at a time. Thanks for joining our GOTV efforts.
In solidarity,
Kyle Machado
Our Revolution
** **
** **
** **
** **

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").
