name: Jeff Marvin, HillaryClinton.com
subject: checking in: have a plan to vote?
body:
You can help your friends vote. | Derek --

I’m Jeff, the unofficial Team Dad for the digital department here in Brooklyn. (I’m a real dad, too -- I have an 18-month-old daughter, Lucy. She rocks.)

Being team dad can mean pretty much anything, from making sure folks know where they’re going when they get off a plane in Ohio to having working internet to putting together logistics plans for big events.

Right now, I’m focused on one thing: making sure everyone on our team has a plan to vote. You better believe I’m going to count the “I Voted” stickers I see around me.

Science shows that making a plan to vote and sharing that plan goes a long way toward ensuring someone actually goes to the polls. Can you make sure your friends have a plan to vote on Tuesday? You’ll be doing them a favor, I promise.

**Share this on Facebook, or forward this along to all the people in your life you need to make a plan.** [](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjY5OTE0ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDk2MTIzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Jeff

Jeff Marvin
Digital Operations Director
Hillary for America

P.S. If you need to a make a plan yourself -- **[you can get started right here!](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjY5OTE0ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDk2MTIzS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

|
**Will you Get Out the Vote for Hillary?**
Sign up for a volunteer shift (or two or three) in the final days before Election Day:
| [
](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjY5OTE0ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDk2MTIzS0&mt=2&rj=OTIxMDk2MTIzS0&rt=0)
---

**** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjY5OTE0ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDk2MTIzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjY5OTE0ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDk2MTIzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Opening this email on your iPhone? [Click here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjY5OTE0ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDk2MTIzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to get our Hillary 2016 mobile app now. Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjY5OTE0ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDk2MTIzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjY5OTE0ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDk2MTIzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjY5OTE0ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDk2MTIzS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjY5OTE0ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDk2MTIzS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjY5OTE0ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDk2MTIzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjY5OTE0ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDk2MTIzS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjY5OTE0ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDk2MTIzS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjY5OTE0ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMDk2MTIzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
clean_body: You can help your friends vote. | Derek -- I’m Jeff, the unofficial Team Dad for the digital department here in Brooklyn. (I’m a real dad, too -- I have an 18-month-old daughter, Lucy. She rocks.) Being team dad can mean pretty much anything, from making sure folks know where they’re going when they get off a plane in Ohio to having working internet to putting together logistics plans for big events. Right now, I’m focused on one thing: making sure everyone on our team has a plan to vote. You better believe I’m going to count the “I Voted” stickers I see around me. Science shows that making a plan to vote and sharing that plan goes a long way toward ensuring someone actually goes to the polls. Can you make sure your friends have a plan to vote on Tuesday? You’ll be doing them a favor, I promise. Share this on Facebook, or forward this along to all the people in your life you need to make a plan. Thanks, Jeff Jeff Marvin Digital Operations Director Hillary for America P.S. If you need to a make a plan yourself -- | Will you Get Out the Vote for Hillary? Sign up for a volunteer shift (or two or three) in the final days before Election Day: | **** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House). Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

name: Deborah Ross
subject: how are you holding up?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Emotions are running high across the nation, and perhaps nowhere more so than in battleground states like North Carolina.

**The nerve center of Election Day 2016 cuts right through our state.**

If we win, we can take back the Senate for Democrats, assume the mantle of progress, and get to work for everyday people in North Carolina and across the country.

**I know this is in reach.**

We only have 48 hours to go, but we have a lot to do. We need to make sure every supporter gets out to vote on Tuesday. We need resources for vans, campaign literature, and volunteer support.

[_**The extent of our Get Out the Vote effort correlates directly to the amount of grassroots contributions we can raise in the next 48 hours.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f42043/2cc31c44/4372763/19f9dbd9/3378264110/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161106?refcode=dre161106_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

name: GreggForGovernor.com
subject: To-do list for Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
body:
It's Sunday night, and I bet you're planning out your week. But if you haven't planned out how you're voting on Tuesday, it's really important that you do it now.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7425570895998613504/-8589629426897647616?utm_campaign=gotv_plan2_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&source=em16_161106_gotv_gq_plan2_ful__gfg)
---
Peter, It's Sunday night, and I bet you're planning out your week. But if you haven't planned out how you're voting on Tuesday, it's really important that you do it now. **[Make your plan to vote now, and find your polling place.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7425570895998613504/-8589629426897647616?utm_campaign=gotv_plan2_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&source=em16_161106_gotv_gq_plan2_ful__gfg)** The polls are EXTREMELY close. We're expecting record turnout on Tuesday. Your single vote could tip the election, and whether or not you vote is a matter of public record. That's why I want to make sure you have a plan. In a race this important, we can't leave anything to chance. Now's the time to think about these questions:
1. **[When will you vote?](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7425570895998613504/-8589629426897647616?utm_campaign=gotv_plan2_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&source=em16_161106_gotv_gq_plan2_ful__gfg)** \- Will you vote in the morning? Afternoon? Or after work?
2. **[Where do you vote?](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7425570895998613504/-8589629426897647616?utm_campaign=gotv_plan2_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&source=em16_161106_gotv_gq_plan2_ful__gfg)** \- Have you looked up your polling place?
3. **[How will you get there?](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7425570895998613504/-8589629426897647616?utm_campaign=gotv_plan2_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&source=em16_161106_gotv_gq_plan2_ful__gfg)** \- Do you need to gas up your car? Have you checked the bus schedule? Do you need to find a ride?

**[This is essential: You need to make your plan to vote today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7425570895998613504/-8589629426897647616?utm_campaign=gotv_plan2_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&source=em16_161106_gotv_gq_plan2_ful__gfg)** Thanks for doing your duty and being a voter, Tim Henderson
Campaign Manager
GreggForGovernor.com
| | [**Make a plan to vote ->**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7425570895998613504/-8589629426897647616?utm_campaign=gotv_plan2_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&source=em16_161106_gotv_gq_plan2_ful__gfg)
---

P.S. Already voted? Make sure your friends do their part too: [Forward To A Friend](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7425570895998613504/-8733744614973503488)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7425570895998613504/-8445514238821791744) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7425570895998613504/-8373456644783863808)
Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
---
Gregg for Indiana
PO Box 44224
Indianapolis IN 46244 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7425570895998613504/-8805802209011431424).

name: Andrew Whalen, ChrisKoster.com
subject: make the commitment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Koster for Missouri, Gary Mallory, Treasurer
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-591073687952291840/-4914692130963322880?utm_campaign=gotv_commit_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&ms=em16161106gotvcommitgqfulaw&refcode=em16161106gotvcommitgqfulaw)

Hey,

Thanks to you and the support of thousands of Missourians, we are in a strong position going into Election Day.

But all of our hard work will mean nothing if we don't turn out a record number of voters on Tuesday. So before you get distracted by the onslaught of political news and excitement of the final days, [**take a moment to find your polling place, make a plan, and commit to vote today.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-591073687952291840/-4914692130963322880?utm_campaign=gotv_commit_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&ms=em16161106gotvcommitgqfulaw&refcode=em16161106gotvcommitgqfulaw)

Make no mistake -- this will be a tight race. We are counting on every vote to help us win and move Missouri forward. With your support, we will elect Chris Koster and set a course for Missouri that improves the lives of working families across the state.

Don't miss this opportunity to make your voice heard. [**Make the commitment to cast your vote today. **](https://act.myngp.com/el/-591073687952291840/-4914692130963322880?utm_campaign=gotv_commit_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&ms=em16161106gotvcommitgqfulaw&refcode=em16161106gotvcommitgqfulaw)

Thank you,

Andrew Whalen
Campaign Manager

_**P.S. Ready to vote? [Forward To A Friend](https://act.myngp.com/el/-591073687952291840/-5058807319039178752) who needs more information.**_

[COMMIT TO VOTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/-591073687952291840/-4914692130963322880)

Paid for by Koster for Missouri, Gary Mallory, Treasurer

name: Jessica O'Connell, EMILY's List
subject: Polling → race ratings → turnout
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7546/24c69fd9/6d87c11/18ecd3a3/2864557773/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEW16N_digital_email_20161106_NoMorePolls_n-allw&source=WPEFEW16N_digital_email_20161106_NoMorePolls_n-allw")
---

Hi there,

I won't be sending any more polling updates this cycle.

No more race ratings and no more new fundraising numbers from our opponents.

We're two days out from Election Day, and right now, all of our focus is on turnout.

Our candidates are going to keep sprinting ahead, talking about the issues they care about, and making their closing arguments to voters. They're doing absolutely everything they can.

But if our women don't have the resources to keep going full speed ahead through Tuesday, they could fall behind. And there's no time to make up for that. Flipping the Senate, clearing out some of the worst Republicans in the House, and electing the first woman president all come down to what happens in these last two days.

So we need to do absolutely everything we can too.

**Donate $3 to help our candidates power through Election Day and win:**

One of our top priorities is immediately investing additional dollars behind our TV, radio and digital ad campaigns in key battlegrounds, where we’re seeing tremendous success. name: Rob Portman
subject: We're almost there
body:
| Peter,

We're almost there -- there are just two days until Election Day! Jane, Jed, Will, Sally, and I are traveling across Ohio on our Countdown to Victory RV Tour, meeting with supporters, thanking our volunteers, and encouraging everyone to vote in this election. Yesterday, we were in Terrace Park, Centerville, Delaware, and Columbus and today we'll be in Toledo and Cleveland.

[](https://www.robportman.com/watch_countdown_to_victory_rv_tour?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ctvrv_update3&n=1)
On Tuesday, Ohio voters will have a clear choice between moving forward with our pro-growth policies for better wages and more jobs, or returning to Ted Strickland's failed policies of bigger government, higher taxes, and more regulations.

We're taking nothing for granted. Our grassroots team has contacted more than 5.5 million targeted voters, and we're not stopping now. Just yesterday, our team contacted more than 175,000 voters! If you'd like to help us in our final push to spread our vision for a brighter future for all Ohioans, please [click here](https://www.robportman.com/volunteer?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ctvrv_update3&n=2) to sign up to volunteer.

If you need help locating your polling place, please [click here](MYOHIOVOTE.COM). All best,
Rob Portman [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ctvrv_update3&n=3)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ctvrv_update3&n=4)[

](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ctvrv_update3&n=5)
---
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ctvrv_update3&n=6). -=-=-

subject: 1.7-million-dollar question
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| There are a lot of ways to tell you're close to victory.

Polls are a good indicator, but sometimes right-wing spending can reveal just as much.

**The latest Quinnipiac poll had Deborah four points ahead, and Mitch McConnell 's Super PAC dropped $1.7 million into North Carolina over the final days of the campaign.**

When the right-wing spending groups get nervous, they write checks. That's what's happening now.

Deborah is close to taking Senator Burr's seat and turning the Senate over to the Democrats, so Super PACs are trying to make sure North Carolina's airwaves are awash in distortions before Election Day.

[_**So team, here 's our question for you: Can you give $5 so we can counteract the smears and urge supporter to get to the polls? Chip in $5, and we'll make it $10.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f42044/2cc31c44/43baf6a/19f9da75/69742072/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161106pm?refcode=dre161106pm_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Victor=20Ochoa?=
subject: Meet Victor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant (R)
body:
| | |
---
[View this email in your browser](http://us13.campaign-archive1.com/?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=d51497d44a&e=32f1a3df98)
---
| |
---
| | Friend

You may have seen me on the road with Bill – I’m the one behind the wheel of the Big Blue Ballot Bus! AKA, the Victor-y bus!

Something you might not know about me – I’m the reigning Yakima County Bus Rodeo champ 4 years in a row, and I’m doing my part to help Bill win this election. I’m sending this message because I need you to do yours too.

[**_Bill is leading by 7 points among voters who still need to return their ballots._**](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=c6f00838f2&e=32f1a3df98) I need you to get to the nearest phone bank, where all our phones are loaded with these late voters. All we need are butts in those chairs, because those phones aren’t going to dial themselves.

[**_Here’s a list of all the phone banks_**](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=08d158ddac&e=32f1a3df98) across the state. Get to one, bring your friends, and spend a few hours helping elect Bill as our next governor. When we win, you’ll be able to tell your friends and family you were on Team Bill.

**Victor Ochoa**
Bus Driver (and so much more)
Bill Bryant for Governor

name: Eric Hyers
subject: Gianforte's no-good-really-bad week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

[**_We 're asking for $15. _**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=TX4%2BqbnKGnIC%2BpYYj8XEzJvAHamFU7mU)

Let's recap Greg Gianforte's no-good-really-bad week.

His fundraising has dried up so he had to write himself another check for $500,000, bringing his total self-funding to $5.8 million.

He is still trailing in the polls after running the most campaign ads of any gubernatorial candidate in the country.

He got into a heated argument with a Montanan on the campaign trail -- lying about his past support for a statewide sales tax despite clear evidence to the contrary.

We saw another article about him making up fake newspaper headlines to use in a TV spot falsely attacking Steve.

He was caught photoshopping Steve's head on to a stock photo in a negative mailer -- this is really low and desperate.

It's clear that Greg Gianforte is willing to say or do anything to try to win this race. [**_Make sure it doesn't work. Pitch in $15._**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=UyUXkKnF8PARtIum0uTuLJvAHamFU7mU)

Thanks,

Eric Hyers
Campaign Manager

Friends of Steve Bullock

Helena MT 59624 United States

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Mike=20Pence?=
subject: Join for final push to victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Donald Trump and I are ready to get to work for you in Washington. But we need your help to close strong and WIN. |

Friend, This is it. We have just 48 hours to secure all the votes we can to win this historic presidential race on Tuesday. We need EVERY supporter on board – if you haven’t joined Team Trump yet, please do so IMMEDIATELY by following this link. The momentum is clearly on our side in this race, and we can’t let up for a moment. We MUST save our country from political corruption and the failed Obama-Clinton liberal agenda. JOIN NOW with an emergency contribution to help us get-out-the-vote. RUSH YOUR EMERGENCY SUPPORT It’s a close race – but with your help, I know we’ll win on Tuesday. The enthusiasm that I’m seeing from not just Republicans, but independents and many Democrats around the country, is like nothing I’ve seen in my lifetime since the days of Ronald Reagan. And when we win, President-elect Trump and I will get to work IMMEDIATELY for the American people. RUSH YOUR EMERGENCY SUPPORT I am so honored to be Donald Trump’s running mate, because I know we’re going get big things done for our country – real change that will truly Make America Great Again. We’re going to repeal Obamacare, which is devastating families and businesses, and replace it with market-based reforms. We’re going to cut taxes, roll back regulation and negotiate better trade deals, to bring millions of good jobs back to our country. We’re going to drain the swamp in Washington and hold the career politicians and bureaucrats accountable. And this is just to start. But we won’t be able to do any of it unless we win on Tuesday. Your emergency support is CRUCIAL, and every hour counts right now – please join today. Time is running out, so make your most generous possible contribution. Every bit of support will help secure another vote for Trump-Pence to put us over the top. Thank you! For a stronger America, Governor Mike Pence P.S. This race is coming down the wire, and we need every supporter who has not yet contributed to JOIN TODAY. We must win this election, so we can get to work right away moving forward the real change America needs. Help us get out the vote and make history on Tuesday. RUSH YOUR EMERGENCY SUPPORT

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Joe Donnelly
subject: I'll be quick, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50603/7be36b49/1e201b3d/78f99bf6/1255948981/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Friend,

I'll be quick. My friend and fellow Hoosier Evan Bayh is running a tough race for the U.S. Senate, and **[he needs you to step up.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50603/7be36b49/1e201b3d/78f99bf5/1255948981/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalstretch?refcode=20161106.2nd&amount=10")**

Hoosiers need Evan in the Senate to fight for the middle class, seniors, and veterans. And I need Evan, too -- because the more of us there are putting common-sense policy solutions above partisan ideology and gridlock, the better we'll be at getting things done for the folks back home.

**Friend, this isn 't one of those races you can sit out.** Special interests like the Koch brothers are throwing millions at defeating Evan. We'll only succeed _if we all stand together._

**[That's why I'm asking you, with just two days left: Will you chip in $5 to help Evan win?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50603/7be36b49/1e201b3d/78f99bf5/1255948981/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalstretch?refcode=20161106.2nd&amount=10")**

Evan is a true Hoosier public servant. He proved that as our governor and senator. He has strong Indiana roots, a wealth of experience, and a blueprint to help our state succeed. **All that 's missing is you.**

**[Please say you'll pitch in $5 to help Evan win his election -- and let's get the Senate back to work.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50603/7be36b49/1e201b3d/78f99bf5/1255948981/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalstretch?refcode=20161106.2nd&amount=10")**

Thank you,

Joe Donnelly ** **** ** ************[Contribute](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50603/7be36b49/1e201b3d/78f99bf4/1255948981/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalstretch?refcode=20161106.2nd&amount=25")************
Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W. Market Street #153, Indianapolis, IN 46204

* * *

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

And I need Evan, too -- because the more of us there are putting common-sense policy solutions above partisan ideology and gridlock, the better we'll be at getting things done for the folks back home. Friend, this isn 't one of those races you can sit out. Special interests like the Koch brothers are throwing millions at defeating Evan. We'll only succeed if we all stand together. "" Evan is a true Hoosier public servant. He proved that as our governor and senator. He has strong Indiana roots, a wealth of experience, and a blueprint to help our state succeed. All that 's missing is you. "" Thank you, Joe Donnelly ********** ""******** Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W. Market Street #153, Indianapolis, IN 46204

name: Lucinda Guinn, EMILY's List
subject: [Flip the Senate] Help needed in PA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:

| | Hi there,

Katie McGinty needs us now.

A Republican super PAC affiliated with Mitch McConnell just announced they're dropping another $1.3 million against Katie in the Pennsylvania Senate race this week. That's in addition to the $5 million they had already planned to spend over the last two weeks.

If we're going to flip the Senate, we have to flip this seat with Katie. And we have only two days left to make a difference.

**[Rush a $3 donation directly to Katie right now. 100% of your donation will go to her campaign.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c753f/24c69fd9/6fb2d1e/18ecfc65/1216553920/VEsE/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/katie-mcginty?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Rush+a+3+donation+directly+to+Katie+righ&utm_campaign=WPEFCW17N_digital_email_20161106_McGinty_n-all&source=WPEFCW17N_digital_email_20161106_McGinty_n-all")**

_Cook Political Report_ has had this race in its toss-up column for months.

We were by Katie's side through a tough primary and helped her hit the ground running in the general. Her opponent, Senator Pat Toomey, has stuck by Donald Trump after every new heinous comment and revelation.

We can help flip the Senate, elect an outstanding pro-choice woman, and defeat a pro-Trump Republican all in one go. But what we raise for Katie right now could make the difference.

**Rush a $3 donation to help Katie win on Tuesday. 100% of your donation will go directly to her campaign:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Help-Katie-Today](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c753f/24c69fd9/6fb2d1e/18ecfc66/1216553920/VEsF/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/katie-mcginty?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHelpKatieToday&utm_campaign=WPEFCW17N_digital_email_20161106_McGinty_n-all&source=WPEFCW17N_digital_email_20161106_McGinty_n-all")**

Thanks for helping Katie,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

name: Russ Feingold
subject: This is it
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
My race is on a razor-thin margin. We cannot afford to let up. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4686/1c469400/1536e28/35450ad/4094180002/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-06_evening-rdf_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-06_2016-11-06_evening-rdf&utm_campaign=evening-rdf&utm_medium=ema") Friend, This is it, folks: We're in a full-on sprint toward Election Day. We've been working hard since day one of this campaign, and we haven't slowed down. Senators Bernie Sanders and Jeff Merkley campaigned with me at the beginning of the week, and I was joined by Joe Biden in Madison on Friday. Today, Tim Kaine and I met with supporters in Milwaukee and Green Bay. **But I'll be honest: Bernie, Jeff, Joe, and Tim didn't come here because Wisconsin is a sure thing for Democrats._They came because it's not._** Right-wing groups will have spent $10 million in these final days to try and close the gap between me and Senator Johnson. And now, Senator Johnson is within one point of us. This race is too close to call. Friend, we can't let up for one second. **[I've asked so much of you, but I have to ask one last time. Will you make a contribution before tomorrow night's deadline?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4686/1c469400/1536e28/35450ad/4094180002/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-06_evening-rdf_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-06_2016-11-06_evening-rdf&utm_campaign=evening-rdf&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4686/1c469400/1536e28/35450ad/4094180002/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-06_evening-rdf_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-06_2016-11-06_evening-rdf&utm_campaign=evening-rdf&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4686/1c469400/1536e28/35450ad/4094180002/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-06_evening-rdf_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-06_2016-11-06_evening-rdf&utm_campaign=evening-rdf&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4686/1c469400/1536e28/35450aa/4094180002/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-06_evening-rdf_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-06_2016-11-06_evening-rdf&utm_campaign=evening-rdf&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| | [$25 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4686/1c469400/1536e28/35450ab/4094180002/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-06_evening-rdf_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-06_2016-11-06_evening-rdf&utm_campaign=evening-rdf&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$100 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4686/1c469400/1536e28/35450a8/4094180002/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-06_evening-rdf_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-06_2016-11-06_evening-rdf&utm_campaign=evening-rdf&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| | [Other »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4686/1c469400/1536e28/35450a9/4094180002/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-06_evening-rdf_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-06_2016-11-06_evening-rdf&utm_campaign=evening-rdf&utm_medium=ema&express_lane_other")
---
The good news is, we don't have to out-spend them: We've made strategic decisions and know exactly where we need to put our dollars in the final days. What we need to do is hit our fundraising goal by midnight tomorrow to make sure our get-out-the-vote program is fully funded.
I'm fired up, I'm energized, and I'm excited to meet with as many voters as I can to make my final pitch to them.
Thanks for all you're doing.
Sincerely,
Russ
[CONTRIBUTE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4686/1c469400/1536e28/35450ad/4094180002/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-06_evening-rdf_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-06_2016-11-06_evening-rdf&utm_campaign=evening-rdf&utm_medium=ema")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to make a contribution to Russ for Wisconsin, [click here.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4686/1c469400/1536e28/35450a6/4094180002/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-def?utm_source=ema_2016-01-14_fr-footer-contribute&refcode=ema_2016-01-14_fr-footer-contribute&utm_campaign=advocacy-footer-contribute&utm_medium=ema") If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4686/1c469400/1536e28/35450a7/4094180002/VEsHBA/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/fr-optput"). If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4686/1c469400/1536e28/35450a4/4094180002/VEsHBw/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo"). [Click here to unsubscribe](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4686/1c469400/1536e28/35450a5/4094180002/VEsHBg/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/unsubscribe"). Contributions or gifts to Russ for Wisconsin are not tax deductible. | Authorized and paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
